chunks.text: WICSE Presidents 2007-2008: Bonnie Kirkpatrick and Lynn Wang. 2006: Bonnie Kirkpatrick and Juliet Holwill. 2005: Marci Meingast. 2004: Marci Meingast and Cecilia Aragon. 2003: Hayley Iben and Marci Meingast. 2002: Hayley Iben and Shannon Zelinski. 2001: Judith Liebman. 2000: Jinwen Xiao and Lixia Zhou. 1999: Randi Thomas. 1998: Megan Thomas. 1997: Janice Hudgings and Chen-Nee Chuah. 1996: Marlene Wan. 1995: Kim Keeton. 1994: Lisa Buckman and Ginger Ogle. 1993: Carol Paxson and Gitanjali Swamy. 1992: Linda Kamas, Nobuko Nathan, Ruth Rosenholtz. 1991: Dawn Tilbury. 1990: Jennifer McManis. 1989: Doris Karlson. 1988: Marie desJardins and Amy Wendt. 1987: Christine Black. 1986: Barbara Mills. 1985: Cecilia Aragon. 1984: Myra Boenke. 1983: Kathie Nichols. 1982: Deborah Estrin. 1981: Jane Doughty. 1980: Joan Boyer. 1979: Faith Fich. 1978: Barbara Simons. 1977: Paula Hawthorn.
chunks.question: Who were the WICSE presidents from 2007 to 1977?
